entities.name: STREPTOMYCES ALBUS CAI-21
entities.description: A strain of Streptomyces albus with plant growth-promotion and biocontrol abilities against charcoal rot.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTION
entities.description: The ability of a microorganism to enhance the growth of plants.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop where S. albus CAI-21 showed growth-promotion abilities.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop where S. albus CAI-21 showed growth-promotion abilities.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop where S. albus CAI-21 showed growth-promotion abilities.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by charcoal rot and treated with S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A disease in sorghum caused by the pathogen Macrophomina phaseolina.

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing charcoal rot in sorghum.

entities.name: ORGANOPHOSPHATE
entities.description: A secondary metabolite produced by S. albus CAI-21 that inhibits the growth of M. phaseolina.

entities.name: DUAL-CULTURE ASSAY
entities.description: An assay used to evaluate the inhibition of M. phaseolina by S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: METABOLITE PRODUCTION ASSAY
entities.description: An assay used to evaluate the inhibition of M. phaseolina by metabolites of S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: BLOTTER PAPER ASSAY
entities.description: An assay used to evaluate the inhibition of M. phaseolina by S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: TOOTHPICK METHOD
entities.description: A method used for the inoculation of M. phaseolina in greenhouse and field trials.

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to examine the phloem and xylem tissues of treated and diseased sorghum shoots.

entities.name: CHROMATOGRAPHIC TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to purify the culture filtrate of S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: NMR
entities.description: Nuclear Magnetic Resonance, used to identify the active compound organophosphate.

entities.name: MS
entities.description: Mass Spectrometry, used to identify the active compound organophosphate.

entities.name: POISONED FOOD TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique used to test the efficacy of organophosphate in inhibiting M. phaseolina.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Controlled environment used for testing the biocontrol potential of S. albus CAI-21.

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural environment used for testing the biocontrol potential of S. albus CAI-21.
